info.title: Agentix API
info.description:
The Agentix API lets you build, deploy, and operate AI chat and voice agents. All requests are sent to `https://api.agntix.ai`. Authenticate with an API key (`x-api-key`) or a Clerk-issued JWT (`Authorization: Bearer <token>`).

Base URL: `https://api.agntix.ai`

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Create and manage AI agents — the core building block of Agentix. An agent encapsulates a system prompt, LLM, tools, knowledge store, and voice configuration.

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Open chat sessions with an agent and exchange messages. Supports streaming responses over SSE.

tags.name: Voice
tags.description: List available voices and TTS/STT models, and create real-time voice sessions.

tags.name: Tools
tags.description: Extend agent capabilities with API tools (webhook calls) or function tools (server-side logic).

tags.name: Phone Numbers
tags.description: Provision and manage telephony numbers for inbound and outbound voice calls.

tags.name: Models
tags.description: Browse available LLM, STT, and TTS models supported by Agentix.

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Query call and agent-level performance metrics.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Create and manage organization-scoped API keys.

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Manage customer contacts that can be linked to chat sessions.

tags.name: Call Campaigns
tags.description: Launch and manage outbound call campaigns against a list of contacts.

tags.name: Subscriptions
tags.description: View billing plans, usage quotas, and manage Stripe subscriptions.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all agents belonging to your organization.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by agent name (case-insensitive substring match).

data.role: You are a helpful support agent for Acme Inc.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of agents with enriched sub-agent tree and filter support.

post.description: Creates a new AI agent for your organization. Use `modelId` from `GET /v1/chat/models` to select an LLM. Enable voice by setting `voiceEnabled: true` and specifying a `voicePipelineMode`.

example.role: You are a helpful, concise support agent for Acme Inc. Always greet the user by name if available.
example.systemPrompt: You specialize in billing, returns, and account access.

example.role: You are a helpful, concise support agent for Acme Inc.

get.description: Retrieves a single agent by its UUID, including its model, attached tools, knowledge store, and voice configuration.

patch.description: Partially updates an agent. Only fields present in the request body are modified. Pass `subAgents: []` to remove all sub-agents.

example.systemPrompt: You specialize in billing, returns, and account access. Be brief.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an agent and detaches it from all phone numbers and campaigns. This action cannot be undone.

post.description: Opens a new chat session with an agent. Returns the session object including the session ID you'll use in subsequent message calls.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of chat sessions for your organization, ordered by most recent first.
Retrieves a single session by ID, including its current state, metadata, and contact.

patch.description: Closes an open session. Once closed, no further messages can be sent. Triggers session-closed webhooks if configured.

reason.description: Optional reason for closing the session.

post.description: Sends a user message to the agent and returns the assistant's reply. Set `stream: true` (the default) to receive the reply as a Server-Sent Events stream. Set `stream: false` for a single JSON response.

example.content: What is my current subscription plan?

200.description: Assistant reply (SSE stream when `stream: true`, JSON object when `stream: false`).

get.description: Returns all messages in a session, ordered chronologically.
Returns all available TTS voices. Voices are sourced from configured providers (ElevenLabs, Azure, etc.). Use `voiceId` when creating an agent with voice enabled.
Returns TTS and STT models available for voice-enabled agents.

post.description: Opens a real-time voice session for an agent. Returns connection tokens for LiveKit.

201.description: Voice session created with LiveKit token.

get.description: Returns the voice providers configured for your organization (e.g. ElevenLabs, Azure, Deepgram).
Returns all tools in your organization. Tools can be API_TOOL (webhooks) or FUNCTION_TOOL (server-side functions).

post.description: Creates a new tool. Provide either `apiTool` (for webhook-based tools) or `functionTool` (for server-side logic). The `ajvPropertiesSchema` defines the JSON Schema the LLM uses to construct the tool call.

example.name: GET_ACCOUNT_BALANCE
example.description: Retrieves the current account balance for the authenticated customer.

get.description: Retrieves a single tool by ID.

patch.description: Partially updates a tool. Changes take effect immediately on all agents that use the tool.

example.description: Retrieves the current account balance and pending transactions.

delete.description: Deletes a tool and automatically detaches it from all agents. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Returns the LLM models available for selection when creating an agent.
Returns all phone numbers provisioned for your organization.

post.description: Provisions a new phone number and optionally maps it to an agent.
Initiates an outbound voice call from a provisioned number to a target phone number.

get.description: Returns all API keys for your organization. Key values are masked — only the prefix is shown after creation.

post.description: Creates a new API key. The full key value is returned **only once** at creation time — store it securely.

example.name: Production server key
example.description: Used by the backend service for agent API calls

201.description: API key created. The `key` field is only present in this response.

post.description: Immediately revokes an API key. Any in-flight requests using this key will receive `401 Unauthorized`.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts for your organization.

post.description: Creates a new contact in your organization.

get.description: Returns all call campaigns for your organization.

post.description: Creates a new outbound call campaign. Contacts can be provided as a CSV upload or imported from Google Sheets.

get.description: Returns aggregated call statistics for your organization over a date range.
Returns available subscription plans with pricing and feature entitlements for your organization.
Returns usage metrics for the current billing cycle, including messages, voice minutes, and API calls.

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Organization API key. Obtain from the [dashboard](https://app.agntix.ai/settings/api-keys). Format: `pk_live_…`

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not permitted to perform this action.

toolId.description: UUID of an existing tool to attach.

toolDescription.description: Optional context-specific description override for this agent.

description.description: Internal description of the agent's purpose.
description.example: Handles tier-1 customer queries for Acme Inc.

role.description: The agent's persona and behavioral role. Used as the system prompt prefix.
role.example: You are a helpful, concise support agent for Acme Inc.

language.description: BCP-47 language code. Controls TTS voice language selection.

systemPrompt.description: Additional system-level instructions appended to the role.
systemPrompt.example: You specialize in billing, returns, and account access. Keep responses under 3 sentences.

specialInstructions.description: Low-priority supplemental instructions (injected after system prompt).

modelId.description: UUID of the LLM to use. Get IDs from `GET /v1/chat/models`.

sttModelId.description: UUID of the Speech-to-Text model (voice agents only).

ttsModelId.description: UUID of the Text-to-Speech model (voice agents only).

voicePipelineMode.description: Voice pipeline mode. `pipeline` = TTS+STT, `sts` = speech-to-speech, `hybrid` = adaptive.

knowledgeStoreId.description: ID of a knowledge store to attach for RAG-based answers.

tools.description: Tools to attach to the agent at creation time.

welcomeAllowInterruptions.description: Whether the welcome prompt can be interrupted by the user (voice only).

UpdateAgentRequest.description: All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.

role.example: You are a helpful support agent for Acme Inc.

platform.description: Originating platform. Affects session tagging and analytics.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs attached to the session (max 4096 characters total). Useful for storing user IDs, locale, etc.

contact.description: Contact information to associate with this session.

content.example: What is my current subscription plan?

stream.description: Stream the response over SSE. Set `false` for a single JSON response.

name.description: Unique tool name. Alphanumeric with underscores, no leading/trailing underscore.

description.description: Explains to the LLM what this tool does and when to call it.
description.example: Retrieves the current account balance for the authenticated customer.

ajvPropertiesSchema.description: JSON Schema for the tool's input parameters. The LLM uses this to construct the call.

preExecutionMessage.description: Message sent to the user before the tool executes (e.g. 'Let me look that up...').

UpdateToolRequest.description: All fields optional — only provided fields are updated.

key.description: The full API key value. Only returned at creation — store it securely.
